ACT-URI-001.description: Use one repair transaction for every discovery origin.

ACT-URI-002.description: Let PM select repair scope directly from a structured defect observation.

ACT-URI-003.description: Create an immutable-history repair graft beside the target and append it at the current frontier.

ACT-URI-004.description: Dispatch substantive repair to Worker, then FlowGuard, then Reviewer.

ACT-URI-005.description: Bind repair contract and all accepted evidence to one fresh generation.

ACT-URI-006.description: Carry repair root, previous repair node, and monotonically increasing attempt lineage.

ACT-URI-007.description: Conserve active membership and explicitly rebind every unaffected sibling.

ACT-URI-008.description: Invalidate and replay the complete affected dependency cone before closure.

ACT-URI-009.description: Make terminal contracts coordinate ordinary repair grafts and require fresh terminal replay.

ACT-URI-010.description: Advance the route version and start a new run instead of reopening a terminal run.

ACT-URI-011.description: Keep authorized waiver and stop as packet-free terminal dispositions with their own authority/lifecycle gates.

authorized_waiver.claim_boundary: name/intent refinement declaration only; runtime parity requires native evidence

redesign_route.claim_boundary: name/intent refinement declaration only; runtime parity requires native evidence

repair_parent_scope.claim_boundary: name/intent refinement declaration only; runtime parity requires native evidence

repair_same_slot.claim_boundary: name/intent refinement declaration only; runtime parity requires native evidence

repair_subtree.claim_boundary: name/intent refinement declaration only; runtime parity requires native evidence

stop_for_user.claim_boundary: name/intent refinement declaration only; runtime parity requires native evidence

does_not_prove: release, install, archive, or production readiness
absence of bugs outside the finite declared repair boundary
claim_boundary.generation_boundary: Diagnosis-generation rows are immutable; current confidence requires exact runtime/native-test closure for the current source identities.
proves: 30 canonical trigger/action combinations satisfy the unified repair contract
20 continue-repair combinations traverse a legal rejected-gate disposal exit without opening work or consuming a terminal round
repair children, when present, bind to the active replacement node and current repair generation
continue-repair decisions pass a distinct staged-effect gate before the post-work quality chain
at least 56 audit-derived known-bad cases are rejected with stable finding/action ids
model, runner, core runtime, and exact relevant test sources have current fingerprints
each model/source/native-test/parent check has one frozen execution owner
coverage shards, child receipts, one parent receipt, and composite handoff acceptance ids are generated

conformance.claim_boundary: Historical diagnosis rows remain immutable. Current runtime/test conformance is green only when exact native owner receipts match the frozen runtime/test fingerprints and cover every obligation.

native_evidence.claim_boundary: This is a read-only exact receipt audit. The unified model runner does not execute, wrap, copy, or relabel either native owner command.

runtime_gap_rows.claim_boundary: The source-marker observation is retained as diagnosis-generation evidence. Current closure requires the exact native owner receipt.
runtime_gap_rows.observation: No pm_historical_defect runtime marker; PM repair decisions are blocker-subject based.
runtime_gap_rows.title: PM proactive historical-defect entry is not first-class

runtime_gap_rows.claim_boundary: The source-marker observation is retained as diagnosis-generation evidence. Current closure requires the exact native owner receipt.
runtime_gap_rows.observation: Terminal repair shares a route_node_id-dependent branch with a current-scope fallback and has no dedicated Worker marker.
runtime_gap_rows.title: Terminal substantive repair can lose Worker/route-node ownership

runtime_gap_rows.claim_boundary: The source-marker observation is retained as diagnosis-generation evidence. Current closure requires the exact native owner receipt.
runtime_gap_rows.observation: No explicit terminal/repair contract generation marker is present in core runtime.
runtime_gap_rows.title: Terminal closure has no explicit contract-generation freshness binding

runtime_gap_rows.claim_boundary: The source-marker observation is retained as diagnosis-generation evidence. Current closure requires the exact native owner receipt.
runtime_gap_rows.observation: Core runtime has no explicit repair_root_id + previous_repair_node_id pair.
runtime_gap_rows.title: Repeated repair lineage is not represented as root plus previous repair link

runtime_gap_rows.claim_boundary: The source-marker observation is retained as diagnosis-generation evidence. Current closure requires the exact native owner receipt.
runtime_gap_rows.observation: No explicit unaffected_rebound_ids membership receipt is present.
runtime_gap_rows.title: Replacement does not expose unaffected-sibling membership conservation

runtime_gap_rows.claim_boundary: The source-marker observation is retained as diagnosis-generation evidence. Current closure requires the exact native owner receipt.
runtime_gap_rows.observation: Terminal supplemental repair is a separate named path and no repair_trigger_origin marker exists.
runtime_gap_rows.title: Discovery phases do not converge on one typed repair trigger

runtime_gap_rows.claim_boundary: The source-marker observation is retained as diagnosis-generation evidence. Current closure requires the exact native owner receipt.
runtime_gap_rows.observation: No dependency_cone or impact_cone marker is present in core runtime.
runtime_gap_rows.title: Repair does not expose a complete affected dependency cone receipt

runtime_gap_rows.claim_boundary: The source-marker observation is retained as diagnosis-generation evidence. Current closure requires the exact native owner receipt.
runtime_gap_rows.observation: Core runtime lacks the explicit repairs_node_id + execution_frontier_appended pair.
runtime_gap_rows.title: Logical repair anchoring and current-frontier execution are not separate explicit facts

runtime_gap_rows.claim_boundary: The source-marker observation is retained as diagnosis-generation evidence. Current closure requires the exact native owner receipt.
runtime_gap_rows.observation: ACTION_REFINEMENT_MAP has no runtime action for repair_subtree; no repair_subtree marker is present in core runtime.
runtime_gap_rows.title: Modeled subtree repair has no explicit runtime action refinement

runtime_gap_rows.claim_boundary: The source-marker observation is retained as diagnosis-generation evidence. Current closure requires the exact native owner receipt.
runtime_gap_rows.observation: The model's authorized_waiver maps to waive_with_authority; only current typed runtime evidence bound to the native runtime receipt proves authority and terminal-disposition semantics.
runtime_gap_rows.title: Authorized-waiver refinement to waive_with_authority remains semantically unverified

runtime_gap_rows.claim_boundary: The source-marker observation is retained as diagnosis-generation evidence. Current closure requires the exact native owner receipt.
runtime_gap_rows.observation: Core runtime does not expose both staged_effect_id and decision_gate_sequence markers for pre-worker current/parent repair decisions.
runtime_gap_rows.title: Current-scope and parent-scope repair lack one explicit staged-effect decision identity

runtime_gap_rows.claim_boundary: The source-marker observation is retained as diagnosis-generation evidence. Current closure requires the exact native owner receipt.
runtime_gap_rows.observation: The distinct-run owner spans run_shell.py, migration.py, and pointer_store.py; a non-empty new run id alone does not prove source-run immutability or read-only imported output.
runtime_gap_rows.title: Completed or stopped source-run repair lacks a distinct current run with read-only imported outputs

coverage_receipts.claim_boundary: Coverage shards and receipt identities are generated here. Each external parent must consume the current parent receipt in its own check; this projection does not execute that parent.

diagnosis_generation.claim_boundary: Historical model-analysis findings remain evidence of the diagnosis generation. They are not erased by a later current runtime/test pass and cannot substitute for that pass.

URI-F001.message: PM repair scope was not selected explicitly

URI-F002.message: PM historical defect was forced through a blocker prerequisite

URI-F003.message: accepted historical node state was mutated in place

URI-F004.message: repair graft does not point to its historical target

URI-F005.message: repair graft is not in the target's logical owning slot

URI-F006.message: repair work was inserted into historical order instead of the current frontier

URI-F007.message: substantive repair packet is not owned by Worker

URI-F008.message: repair packet lacks a concrete repair route node identity

URI-F009.message: repair gates do not follow Worker -> FlowGuard -> Reviewer

URI-F010.message: repair evidence is stale or crosses generations

URI-F011.message: repeated repair lineage is missing or discontinuous

URI-F012.message: active route membership is not conserved across replacement

URI-F013.message: unaffected sibling membership was not rebound into the new route version

URI-F014.message: final ledger omits an active route member

URI-F015.message: affected downstream evidence was not marked stale

URI-F016.message: stale downstream work was not replayed

URI-F017.message: terminal repair lacks its coordinating supplemental contract

URI-F018.message: terminal contract items are not projected onto repair nodes

URI-F019.message: terminal closure reused evidence predating the terminal repair contract

URI-F020.message: runtime opened a terminal repair round beyond the declared cap

URI-F021.message: selected repair scope was not materialized with matching scope semantics

URI-F022.message: repair changed active membership without advancing route version

URI-F023.message: repair attempted to reopen a complete or stopped run

URI-F024.message: terminal repair used a parallel shortcut instead of the ordinary repair transaction

URI-F025.message: superseded target remains an active route member

URI-F026.message: terminal backward replay did not rerun after repair

URI-F027.message: repair contract has no current evidence generation

URI-F028.message: unaffected sibling evidence was invalidated without declared dependency impact

URI-F029.message: repair trigger lacks a structured defect observation

URI-F030.message: authorized waiver lacks an explicit authority reference

URI-F031.message: terminal disposition created substantive repair work

URI-F032.message: stop_for_user did not terminate the current run

URI-F033.message: repair child identity vectors are malformed or ambiguous

URI-F034.message: repair child is not parented by the active replacement repair node

URI-F035.message: repair child generation is stale for the current repair generation

URI-F036.message: continue-repair decision gate is missing, stale, rejected, or out of order

URI-F037.message: staged repair effect committed or opened Worker before the decision gate accepted it

URI-F038.message: decision-gate Reviewer evidence was reused as post-work Reviewer evidence

URI-F039.message: rejected decision gate left an orphan effect or consumed a terminal repair round

URI-F040.message: terminal disposition entered the continue-repair decision gate

URI-F041.message: repeated repair did not supersede the latest repair generation or formed a lineage cycle

URI-F042.message: repair child is absent from active, terminal, execution, or acceptance closure

URI-F043.message: declared stale/replay work does not equal the dependency graph reachability cone

URI-F044.message: affected parent was not replayed after same-slot or scoped repair

URI-F045.message: terminal-run repair did not create a distinct active run with immutable read-only imports

URI-F046.message: repair effect, worker, evidence, or membership became active before its owning stage

URI-F047.message: rejected decision gate lacks an explicit disposed effect and PM revise/waive/stop/retry exits

native_evidence.claim_boundary: This is a read-only exact receipt audit. The unified model runner does not execute, wrap, copy, or relabel either native owner command.

native_execution_owner_inventory.execution_rule: Each check has one frozen native execution owner; consumers may verify its immutable receipt but never rerun or relabel its command.
